title: explore.dig.net dApp listing metadata
description: The normative metadata contract for one dApp listed on explore.dig.net. One folder per dApp: apps/<slug>/metadata.json validating against this schema, plus apps/<slug>/assets/ (see SPEC.md §4 for the exact asset requirements). CI rejects any listing that does not validate.

slug.description: URL-safe unique identifier. MUST equal the app's folder name under apps/. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; starts and ends alphanumeric; 3-40 chars.

tagline.description: One-line pitch shown on cards and in social previews. Plain text, no markdown. 10-120 chars.

description.description: Long description shown on the detail page. GitHub-flavored markdown SUBSET: paragraphs, ## / ### headings, **bold**, *italic*, `code`, [links](https://...), - bullet lists. Raw HTML is NOT rendered. 80-5000 chars.

category.description: Exactly one primary category (drives the store's category filter).

tags.description: 1-8 free-form lowercase keyword tags (searchable). Each 2-24 chars of [a-z0-9-].

url.description: The live dApp's canonical https URL (the "Open dApp" target).

author.description: The team or person who ships the dApp.

chain.description: The chain the dApp settles on. explore.dig.net lists Chia dApps.

status.description: Lifecycle stage shown as a badge: live = production, real users; beta = usable pre-release / mainnet-experimental; draft = listing incomplete or app not yet public.

featured.description: Curated flag set by store maintainers (not self-service). A featured app MUST carry the full featured asset set (SPEC.md §4.3) and MUST NOT be status "draft".

accentColor.description: The app's brand accent as a 6-digit hex color (e.g. "#3fb950"). Drives the card's ambient glow and the detail page's hero tint.

addedDate.description: The date the listing was added to the store (ISO 8601, YYYY-MM-DD). Drives default sort.

version.description: Optional: the dApp's own released version (semver).

license.description: Optional SPDX license identifier of the dApp's source (e.g. "MIT", "GPL-2.0").

links.description: Optional extra links, all https. Keys are fixed; add only what exists.

placeholderAssets.description: Optional: asset paths (relative to assets/) that are clean BRANDED PLACEHOLDERS pending final art from the author (e.g. ["hero.png"]). Screenshots MUST NEVER be placeholders — a screenshot is always a real capture of the running dApp.
